mnemonics.title: Bitcoin Script Opcodes
mnemonics.content: DCHED - Duplicate, CheckHash, EqualVerify, Dup (Common P2PKH sequence: OP_DUP, OP_HASH160, OP_EQUALVERIFY, OP_CHECKSIG)

mnemonics.title: Oracle Types
mnemonics.content: CFD Oracle - Centralized, Federated, Decentralized (progression from least to most secure)

mnemonics.title: HTLC Components
mnemonics.content: HTP - Hash, TimeLock, Preimage (the three essential components of a Hashed Timelock Contract)
